/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/dos33_save_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/DiskImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/DiskIICard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dos33_save.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_dos33_save  -ldl -lm
